title: Request for flexibility of multiple rows of text
excerpt: Text widget in Boards do not allow flexibility of having multiple rows of text. Experiencing difficult to key in test case description that could sometimes denominate into items ‘a’, ‘b’… etc…

posts.author: leeqiqi (Lee Qi Qi)
posts.cookedHtml: Text widget in Boards do not allow flexibility of having multiple rows of text. Experiencing difficult to key in test case description that could sometimes denominate into items ‘a’, ‘b’… etc…

posts.author: jofra886archer (jofra archer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,@Lee SurgeCard

If you’re stuck in a rigid field, try Shift + Enter to force a new line, or better yet, move that detail into the Description or Discussion area where you actually have room to breathe and use bullet points.
